shortDescription: Hand-stitched floral embroidery hoop on cream linen, set in a natural bamboo hoop. Customizable with names or wishes. A timeless botanical decor piece.
fullDescription:
**Bring the beauty of nature indoors** with our handcrafted Floral Embroidery Hoop. Each piece is a labor of love, stitched with care using soft cotton thread on premium cream linen, and nestled in a natural bamboo hoop. The intricate floral pattern evokes a serene botanical garden, adding a touch of handmade charm to any room. 

**Personalize your hoop** with a name or short blessing – perfect for nurseries, bedrooms, or as a heartfelt gift. Simply send your text at checkout, and our artisans will embroider it gracefully into the design. 

**Product Specifications:**
- Size: 6-inch diameter (ideal for small wall displays or shelf accents)
- Materials: Cotton thread, cream linen, bamboo hoop
- Production time: 7-10 business days (made just for you)
- Ready to hang: The hoop includes a sturdy backing and a discreet hanging loop

**Where to display:**
- Above a desk for a daily dose of floral inspiration
- In a gallery wall with other botanical art
- As a unique baby shower or housewarming gift

Elevate your space with this one-of-a-kind botanical art. Each stitch tells a story – make it yours.
